revision.text: {{cmbox |type = content |text ='''About ''<includeonly>{{cat|{{PAGENAME}}}}</includeonly><noinclude>[Category:Something terrorism-related]</noinclude>'' and related categories''' The scope of this category includes pages whose subjects relate to [[terrorism]], a [[Wikipedia:Manual of Style/Words to watch#Contentious labels|contentious label]]. [[Loaded language|Value-laden labels]]—such as calling an organization and/or individual a terrorist—may express contentious opinion and are best avoided unless widely used by reliable sources to describe the subject, in which case use in-text attribution. Avoid myth in its informal sense, and establish the scholarly context for any formal use of the term. }}<noinclude> {{Documentation}} </noinclude>

{{cmbox |type = content |text ='''About ''<includeonly>{{cat|{{PAGENAME}}}}</includeonly><noinclude>[Category:Something terrorism-related]</noinclude>'' and related categories''' The scope of this category includes pages whose subjects relate to [[terrorism]], a [[Wikipedia:Manual of Style/Words to watch#Contentious labels|contentious label]]. [[Loaded language|Value-laden labels]]—such as calling an organization and/or individual a terrorist—may express contentious opinion and are best avoided unless widely used by reliable sources to describe the subject, in which case use in-text attribution. Avoid myth in its informal sense, and establish the scholarly context for any formal use of the term. }}<noinclude> {{Documentation}} </noinclude>

[[:en:Loaded language|Value-laden labels]]—such as calling an organization and/or individual a terrorist—may express contentious opinion and are best avoided unless widely used by reliable sources to describe the subject, in which case use in-text attribution. Avoid myth in its informal sense, and establish the scholarly context for any formal use of the term. }}<noinclude> {{Documentation}} </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text: {{cmbox |type = content |text ='''About ''<includeonly>{{cat|{{PAGENAME}}}}</includeonly><noinclude>[Category:Something terrorism-related]</noinclude>'' and related categories''' The scope of this category includes pages whose subjects relate to [[:en:Terrorism|Terrorism]], a [[Wikipedia:Manual of Style/Words to watch#Contentious labels|contentious label]]. [[:en:Loaded language|Value-laden labels]]—such as calling an organization and/or individual a terrorist—may express contentious opinion and are best avoided unless widely used by reliable sources to describe the subject, in which case use in-text attribution. Avoid myth in its informal sense, and establish the scholarly context for any formal use of the term. }}<noinclude> {{Documentation}} </noinclude> <noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text: {{cmbox |type = content |text ='''About ''<includeonly>{{cat|{{PAGENAME}}}}</includeonly><noinclude>[Category:Something terrorism-related]</noinclude>'' and related categories''' The scope of this category includes pages whose subjects relate to [[:en:Terrorism|Terrorism]], a [[Wikipedia:Manual of Style/Words to watch#Contentious labels|contentious label]]. [[:en:Loaded language|Value-laden labels]]—such as calling an organization and/or individual a terrorist—may express contentious opinion and are best avoided unless widely used by reliable sources to describe the subject, in which case use in-text attribution. Avoid myth in its informal sense, and establish the scholarly context for any formal use of the term. }}<noinclude> {{Documentation}} </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration

[[:en:Loaded language|Value-laden labels]]—such as calling an organization and/or individual a terrorist—may express contentious opinion and are best avoided unless widely used by reliable sources to describe the subject, in which case use in-text attribution. Avoid myth in its informal sense, and establish the scholarly context for any formal use of the term. }}<noinclude> {{Documentation}} </noinclude> [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
revision.text: {{cmbox |type = content |text ='''About ''<includeonly>{{cat|{{PAGENAME}}}}</includeonly><noinclude>[Category:Something terrorism-related]</noinclude>'' and related categories''' The scope of this category includes pages whose subjects relate to [[:en:Terrorism|Terrorism]], a [[Wikipedia:Manual of Style/Words to watch#Contentious labels|contentious label]]. [[:en:Loaded language|Value-laden labels]]—such as calling an organization and/or individual a terrorist—may express contentious opinion and are best avoided unless widely used by reliable sources to describe the subject, in which case use in-text attribution. Avoid myth in its informal sense, and establish the scholarly context for any formal use of the term. }}<noinclude> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] </noinclude> [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23630749988|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{cmbox |type = content |text ='''About ''<includeonly>{{cat|{{PAGENAME}}}}</includeonly><noinclude>[Category:Something terrorism-related]</noinclude>'' and related categories''' The scope of this category includes pages whose subjects relate to [[:en:Terrorism|Terrorism]], a [[Wikipedia:Manual of Style/Words to watch#Contentious labels|contentious label]]. [[:en:Loaded language|Value-laden labels]]—such as calling an organization and/or individual a terrorist—may express contentious opinion and are best avoided unless widely used by reliable sources to describe the subject, in which case use in-text attribution. Avoid myth in its informal sense, and establish the scholarly context for any formal use of the term. }}<noinclude> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] </noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
